     The Numbers Business Report

One Direction: This is Us (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,873,374Details
International Box Office $39,280,988
Worldwide Box Office $68,154,362
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,934,832
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $7,841,091
Total $22,775,923
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An all-access look at life on the road for the global music phenomenon. Weaved with live concert footage, this film tells the story of Niall, Zayn, Liam, Harry and Louis' rise to fame, from their hometown beginnings and competing on the X-Factor, to conquering the world and performing at London's O2 Arena. Hear it from the boys themselves and see through their own eyes what it's really like to be One Direction.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,815,497 (54.8% of total gross)
Legs:1.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,735 opening theaters/2,735 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $42,475,474

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 30th, 2013 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 30th, 2013 (Wide) (Poland)
August 30th, 2013 (Wide) (Spain)
August 30th, 2013 (Wide), released as One Direction: This Is Us (United Kingdom)
October 18th, 2013 (Wide) (Kenya)
November 1st, 2013 (Wide) (Japan)
Video Release: December 17th, 2013 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for language.
(Rating bulletin 2289, 9/11/2013)
Running Time: 92 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animated Sequences
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Biography, Musicians
Social setting: Pop Music
Subgenre: Music Concert
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Concert/Performance
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Factual
Production/Financing Companies: Tri-Star Pictures, Syco Entertainment, Modest! Management, Warrior Poets, Fulwell 73
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

An all-access look at life on the road for the global music phenomenon. Weaved with live concert footage, this film tells the story of Niall, Zayn, Liam, Harry and Louis' rise to fame, from their hometown beginnings and competing on the X-Factor, to conquering the world and performing at London's O2 Arena. Hear it from the boys themselves and see through their own eyes what it's really like to be One Direction.
